properties.name: plm.auth.invitation.email-subject
properties.description: Email subject used for workspace invitation messages.

properties.name: plm.auth.invitation.email-expire-in-seconds
properties.description: Default expiration window in seconds for email invitations.

properties.name: plm.auth.invitation.link-expire-in-hours
properties.description: Default expiration window in hours for shared invitation links.

properties.name: plm.auth.invitation.max-batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of email invitations accepted in a single batch request.

properties.name: plm.auth.invitation.email-accept-url-template
properties.description: String.format template used to generate workspace email invitation URLs.

properties.name: plm.auth.invitation.link-accept-url-template
properties.description: String.format template used to generate shared workspace invitation URLs.

properties.name: plm.datasource.url
properties.description: PostgreSQL datasource URL used by the shared Flyway and JPA datasource.

properties.name: plm.datasource.driver-class-name
properties.description: JDBC driver class name for the shared datasource.
